data.title: Significant TON Transfer from Kiln to Anonymous Address
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, Arkham data reveals that at 19:10, a total of 2,997,700 TON tokens were transferred from Kiln to an anonymous address starting with Uf9kSlinCL. Subsequently, this address moved a portion of the tokens, amounting to 1,498,800 TON, to another location.

data.title: Crypto Trading Volumes Shatter Records as Futures Dominate 2025
data.description:
Crypto exchange activity surged to record highs in 2025, with total trading volumes reaching unprecedented levels across both spot and derivatives markets, according to CryptoQuant. Futures Take the Lead Looking at the data, futures trading clearly drove the bulk of activity.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/crypto-trading-volumes-shatter-records-as-futures-dominate-2025/

data.title: 21Shares launches Bitcoin–Gold ETP ‘BOLD’ on London Stock Exchange
data.description:
The 21Shares Bitcoin and Gold ETP, branded as BOLD, began trading on the London Stock Exchange on January 13. The listing offers a single exchange-traded vehicle that combines exposure to both Bitcoin and gold. It is worth noting that BOLD hits the UK market just after regulators relaxed long-standing restrictions on crypto exchange-traded products. As […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/21shares-launches-bitcoin-gold-etp-bold/

data.title: Bitget launches its 10th stock token zero-fee trading contest, with a total prize pool of 30,000 BGB.
data.description: Bitget is launching its 10th zero-fee stock token trading competition. During the event, users ranked by cumulative trading volume in tokens such as BLKon, JPMon, and MSTRon will receive an airdrop of 50-800 BGB tokens each. Detailed rules have been published on the official Bitget platform. Users can register by clicking the "Join Now" button to participate. The event ends on January 16th at 18:59 (UTC+8).

data.title: PayPal to Power Payments in Google’s New AI-Driven Commerce Framework
data.description:
As part of the rollout, PayPal will soon be integrated directly into Google’s new AI-powered checkout experience, giving consumers another […] The post PayPal to Power Payments in Google’s New AI-Driven Commerce Framework appeared first on Coindoo.
source: https://coindoo.com/paypal-to-power-payments-in-googles-new-ai-driven-commerce-framework/

data.title: Greeks.live: Market bullish momentum is weak; crypto market participants believe macroeconomic data no longer influences market trends.
data.description: Adam, a macro researcher at Greeks.live, wrote on the X platform that the situation in the Middle East has driven recent gold and silver prices, and macroeconomic data has also had some impact, but cryptocurrencies are currently in a phase that tests investors' patience. The US CPI data will be released tonight at 9:30 PM. Observing the cryptocurrency IV, a significant decrease compared to a week ago is observed, indicating that crypto market participants generally believe that macroeconomic data no longer affects the crypto market. The Skew rebound brought about by the beginning of the month has ended, and it has now fallen back to holiday levels. Market sentiment is weak, bullish momentum is weak, and the market is sensitive to volatility.

data.title: Nigeria requires cryptocurrency transactions to be linked to both tax identification number and national identity number.
data.description: Cointelegraph reported on the X platform that Nigeria now requires cryptocurrency transactions to be linked to tax IDs and national IDs.

data.title: Binance to Conduct Tron Network Wallet Maintenance
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the platform is set to perform wallet maintenance for the Tron Network (TRX) on 2026-01-14 at 06:00 (UTC). To facilitate this process, deposits and withdrawals on the Tron Network will be temporarily suspended starting from 2026-01-14 at 05:55 (UTC). The maintenance is expected to last approximately one hour.

During this period, the trading of tokens on the Tron Network will remain unaffected. Binance assures users that all necessary technical requirements will be managed by the platform. Once the network is confirmed to be stable, deposits and withdrawals will be reopened. No further announcements will be made regarding the resumption of these services.

data.title: Russian woman loses 28 million rubles to a crypto scam
data.description:
A Russian woman in Kursk lost 28 million rubles after being lured into a year-long cryptocurrency investment scam, police said.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/russian-woman-loses-28-million-crypto-scam/

data.title: Scott Bessent hosts global finance ministers to discuss China’s grip on world silver supply
data.description:
Trump’s Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent called a full-scale meeting with his global peers on Monday to get ahead of the worsening mineral supply crunch. With China refining up to 87% of the world’s rare earths and silver prices breaking records, Scott gathered the finance ministers of 11 countries, the EU commissioner, and U. S. trade officials […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/scott-bessent-hosts-global-finance-ministers/

data.title: Binance Alpha will list Empire of Sight (Sight) and Owlto Finance (OWL).
data.description: Binance Alpha will be listing the following projects on its platform: Empire of Sight (Sight) airdrop on January 14th; Owlto Finance (OWL) airdrop on January 15th. Eligible users can claim the airdrop using Binance Alpha Points on the Alpha event page after trading on Alpha opens. Further details will be announced separately.

data.title: A whale withdrew 5,894 ETH from Kraken, worth $18.33 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale (0xCd9...5507) withdrew 5,894 ETH from Kraken, worth $18.33 million. Last week, the same whale withdrew 37.09 million SKY, worth $2.33 million, and staked them.

data.title: Whale Address Withdraws Significant ETH from CEX
data.description: According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, a whale address withdrew 5,894 ETH from a centralized exchange (CEX) 10 minutes ago. Last week, this address also withdrew 37.09 million SKY tokens and transferred them for staking.

data.title: Bernstein Analysts Raise Target Price for Figure Technology Solutions
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, on January 13, analysts from research and brokerage firm Bernstein increased the target stock price for Figure Technology Solutions (FIGR) from $54 to $72, designating it as a 'top recommended stock' for 2026. The analysts highlighted the company's tokenized credit market growth exceeding expectations and ongoing improvements in operational leverage. The new target price suggests a potential 38% increase from the stock's closing price of $52.23 on Monday. Bernstein has consistently rated the stock as 'outperform' since initiating coverage last October.

In a client report released on Tuesday, January 14, led by analyst Gautam Chhugani, the team noted that blockchain-based lending institution Figure stands out amid banking industry transformations and the clearer regulatory framework proposed by the U.S. 'Clear Act,' a draft bill for crypto market structure. The report states that Figure replaces traditional banking ledger systems with blockchain infrastructure, offering long-term growth potential in its tokenized equity business.

Bernstein indicated that Figure's performance has surpassed its originally 'quite optimistic' expectations, driven by a partner-led market model and expansion into new loan categories. The total consumer loan market reached approximately $2.7 billion in the fourth quarter, with the tokenized credit platform Figure Connect processing about 46% of the credit volume from the previous quarter.

The report emphasized that Figure is actively expanding its core HELOC business by introducing new products such as debt coverage loans, small business loans, and crypto asset-backed loans. The company also plans to tokenize its equity to launch a tokenized equity platform for secondary market development. Analysts view the equity business as a long-term 'strategic option' rather than a short-term revenue driver.

data.title: Banks Win Key Battle as Crypto Bill Bars Stablecoin Interest Payments
data.description:
An updated Senate draft of the market structure bill prohibits yield "solely in connection with the holding of a payment stablecoin. "
source: https://decrypt.co/354386/banks-win-key-battle-as-crypto-bill-bars-stablecoin-interest-payments

data.title: Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong Details ‘Huge’ Prediction on Nascent Crypto Sector – Here’s His Outlook
data.description:
Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong says a nascent crypto sector could mirror the explosive growth of stablecoins, calling the opportunity “huge” as blockchain technology continues to reduce friction in global markets. In a new discussion hosted by Goldman Sachs, Armstrong points to the rise of stablecoins as a case study.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2026/01/13/coinbase-ceo-brian-armstrong-details-huge-prediction-on-nascent-crypto-sector-heres-his-outlook/

data.title: Kraken's SPAC has filed for a Nasdaq listing, aiming to raise $250 million.
data.description: US cryptocurrency exchange Kraken is backing a newly formed special purpose acquisition company (SPAC) that plans to go public through a Kraken-affiliated sponsor. KrakAcquisition, a blank-check company jointly backed by Kraken, Tribe Capital, and Natural Capital, filed documents with the US Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) on Monday (January 13) to raise up to $250 million through an initial public offering (IPO). According to the SEC filing, the exempted company, registered in the Cayman Islands in July 2025, plans to issue 25 million shares ($10 each) and apply for listing on the Nasdaq Global Market under the ticker symbol “KRAQU.” While the SPAC primarily targets companies in the cryptocurrency infrastructure sector, Kraken reportedly filed a separate confidential S-1 form last November seeking potential IPO opportunities for its common stock. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Cryptocurrency stocks generally rose in pre-market trading in the US, with Strategy& up 3.11%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, crypto stocks generally rose in pre-market trading in the US, with Strategy up 3.11%, BitMine up 3.56%, Coinbase up 0.91%, Sharplink Gaming up 2.4%, and DeFi Development Corp up 4.69%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, covering US stock and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

data.title: How AI and Tokenized Dollars Will Anchor the 2026 Global Economy
data.description:

source: https://cryptonews.com/exclusives/how-ai-and-tokenized-dollars-will-anchor-the-2026-global-economy/
